title: US Government Bans Advanced Anthropic Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 Models
summary: The government ban on Anthropic's AI models triggers cybersecurity protests and debate in Europe over digital sovereignty.

title: UK to Ban Social Media for Minors Under 16
summary: The British government announces a social media ban for children and teenagers, backed by tech companies and security groups.

title: Fox Buys Roku in a $22 Billion Deal
summary: The merger of Fox and the streaming platform Roku consolidates the television market and affects the stocks of both companies.

title: Sundar Pichai Booed at Stanford Graduation Ceremony
summary: Google's CEO faced backlash during his speech due to the company's ties to Israel contracts and immigration agencies.

title: SpaceX Goes Public in Largest Technology IPO
summary: SpaceX's IPO raises $85.7 billion and highlights Gulf funds' investment in artificial intelligence.

title: Salesforce Acquires Fin (formerly Intercom) for $3.6 Billion
summary: The acquisition of the customer service platform strengthens Salesforce's enterprise artificial intelligence offering.

title: Meta Acknowledges Issues in AI Reorganization After Spending $14 Billion
summary: Meta's CTO admits that the AI restructuring was 'atrocious' as the company invests without clear progress.

title: Chinese Hackers Abused Google Workspace Rules to Steal Research and Defense Emails
summary: A cyber espionage group exploited Workspace configurations to access high-value government accounts.

title: North Korean Hackers Turn Development Tools into Malware Distribution Channels
summary: Attackers use code repositories and development environments to infect developers with malware.

title: Vulnerability in Microsoft 365 Copilot Allows Theft of Emails and MFA Codes
summary: A security flaw in Copilot could have been exploited to steal sensitive data from corporate users.

title: Palo Alto Warns of Active Exploitation of Vulnerability in PAN-OS GlobalProtect
summary: The security company reports ongoing attacks against a critical vulnerability in its enterprise VPN system.

title: Microsoft Turns to AWS for AI Capacity as GitHub Faces Shortage
summary: Growing demand for AI power leads Microsoft to rent infrastructure from its competitor.

title: Amazon Announces Multimillion-Dollar Investment in Data Center in Missouri
summary: The new data center strengthens Amazon's cloud infrastructure in the Midwestern United States.

title: Meta Launches 'AI Mode' on Facebook That Uses Public Information from Its Platforms
summary: The new AI feature extracts data from Instagram and other services to personalize the experience.

title: Meta Used a Pentagon Contractor to Prototype Facial Recognition in Glasses
summary: The development of facial recognition for Meta's smart glasses involved military companies.

title: Satya Nadella Warns of Concentration of Economic Returns in Few AI Systems
summary: Microsoft's CEO warns that a small number of AI systems could capture all the profits.

title: Nvidia Issues $20 Billion in Bonds to Finance AI Debt
summary: The semiconductor company turns to the debt market to finance investments in artificial intelligence.

title: Pokémon Go Data Used to Train AI Linked to Military Drones
summary: Investigation reveals that game data helped develop autonomous surveillance systems for military applications.

title: Scripts of Popular WordPress Plugin Manipulated to Plant Backdoors
summary: A supply chain attack compromises websites using the infected plugin, allowing unauthorized access.

title: The Wave of AI Layoffs Becomes a Powder Keg
summary: AI-driven automation causes mass layoffs in multiple industries, generating labor tensions.
